name: hll-bots
description: Bots de automação para servidores Hell Let Loose via CRCON

scripts.service:start: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; sudo systemctl start "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager
scripts.service:restart: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; sudo systemctl restart "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager
scripts.service:refresh: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; git pull --ff-only && npm install && sudo systemctl restart "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager
scripts.service:stop: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; sudo systemctl stop "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager || true
